creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 248305
v0

It seems samba 4.17 started to use SEC_ACE_TYPE_ACCESS_ALLOWED_OBJECT (its definition is in librpc/idl/security.idl) which is not handled by libsunacl

Without this, provisioning a DC on top of zfs fails with this error:
python3.9: acl_from_aces: a_type is 0x5
python3.9: aces_from_acl failed

I'm not sure the fix is correct though.
